_comment: Copy this file to maps_config.json and edit. 'level' is the UE package
path of the persistent level (find it in the Content Browser: right
click the map asset -> Copy Reference, keep only the /Game/... part
'name' overrides the output subfolder (defaults to the world name).
'defaults' and per-map 'overrides' accept any key from CONFIG in
_bounds_note: ALWAYS set bounds_m from tools/squadcalc_bounds.json (the SDK minimap
corners SquadCalc uses) so the heightmap lines up with the minimap.
downsample_to: 500 additionally writes the drop-in 500x500 file that
